name: Zenlink - Node SDK for ZenHeart
summary: OpenClaw three-phase + upgrade hygiene: backup ZENLINK_* and openclaw mcp.servers env/hooks before teardown; kill old daemons and dedupe MCP; restore then register; post-upgrade run `node dist/cli.js smoke` on the new zenlink-mcp tree and match tools/list count to this release. (1) build/skill/kit (2) fuse (3) apply. Wire shapes: zenlink-mcp tool-input-schemas + tool-permissions-map; FAQ https://zenheart.net/v2/faq/docs/.
author: ZenHeart
